components.name: Button
components.keyInsight: High-contrast calls to action feel tactile because the system pairs a hot primary with a generous 18px radius.

components.name: Card
components.keyInsight: Cards are soft and editorial rather than sterile, relying on warm neutrals instead of stark white.

components.name: Table
components.keyInsight: Data tables stay readable because muted dividers and dark text are balanced against roomy spacing.

components.name: Chart
components.keyInsight: The chart palette mixes warm neutrals with bright digital accents, giving analytics a more branded personality.

components.name: Navigation
components.keyInsight: Top-level navigation feels sturdy and dark, contrasting against the lighter content canvas.

components.name: Sidebar
components.keyInsight: Sidebar tokens already exist in the source, so this component becomes a core expression of the system rather than an add-on.

crossComponentPatterns.cornerStyle: A single generous 18px radius shapes cards, buttons, and shell surfaces.
crossComponentPatterns.density: 4px base spacing with roomy internal padding, prioritizing legibility over compact data density.
crossComponentPatterns.surfaceModel: Warm neutral surfaces pair with dark text in light mode and charcoal panels in dark mode.
